description: Personal Garmin health metrics — sleep, HRV baseline, RHR anomalies, training load, weather.

panels.description: Resting heart rate with 28-day rolling baseline. Sustained rise above baseline is a classic illness/overtraining flag.

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', d.metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       d.resting_heart_rate AS rhr,
       r.baseline_28d AS baseline_28d
FROM daily_health_metrics d
LEFT JOIN rhr_anomaly r
  ON r.user_id = d.user_id AND r.metric_date = d.metric_date
WHERE d.user_id = 1
  AND d.resting_heart_rate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.metric_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', d.metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, d.resting_heart_rate AS rhr, r.baseline_28d FROM daily_health_metrics d LEFT JOIN rhr_anomaly r ON r.user_id = d.user_id AND r.metric_date = d.metric_date WHERE d.user_id = 1 AND d.resting_heart_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.metric_date

panels.title: Resting HR vs 28-day baseline

panels.description: RHR z-score. >2.5 = strong anomaly. 'PERSISTENT' means 2+ consecutive HIGH days — the Stanford early-illness signal.

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       z_score
FROM rhr_anomaly
WHERE user_id = 1 AND z_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY metric_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, z_score FROM rhr_anomaly WHERE user_id = 1 AND z_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY metric_date

panels.title: RHR anomaly z-score

panels.description: Nightly HRV (RMSSD-like) vs 7-day baseline, with ±1 SD normal band from 60-day history. Below band = suppressed recovery.

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       hrv_raw,
       CAST(ROUND(EXP(baseline_7d)) AS INTEGER) AS baseline_7d_linear
FROM hrv_baseline
WHERE user_id = 1 AND hrv_raw IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY metric_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, hrv_raw, EXP(baseline_7d) AS baseline_7d_linear FROM hrv_baseline WHERE user_id = 1 AND hrv_raw IS NOT NULL ORDER BY metric_date

panels.title: HRV raw vs 7-day baseline

panels.description: HRV status: SUPPRESSED (below -1 SD band) / NORMAL / ELEVATED (above +1 SD band). Based on 60-day history.

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       status AS "HRV status"
FROM hrv_baseline
WHERE user_id = 1 AND status IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY metric_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, status FROM hrv_baseline WHERE user_id = 1 AND status IS NOT NULL ORDER BY metric_date

panels.title: HRV status timeline

panels.description: Sleep stages stacked: deep + light + REM. Awake shown separately.

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       deep_sleep_hours  AS deep,
       light_sleep_hours AS light,
       rem_sleep_hours   AS rem
FROM daily_health_metrics
WHERE user_id = 1 AND sleep_duration_hours IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY metric_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, deep_sleep_hours AS deep, light_sleep_hours AS light, rem_sleep_hours AS rem FROM daily_health_metrics WHERE user_id = 1 AND sleep_duration_hours IS NOT NULL ORDER BY metric_date

panels.title: Sleep stages

panels.description: Garmin training readiness score (0-100). Colour bands: red <50, amber 50-75, green ≥75.

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       training_readiness_score AS readiness
FROM daily_health_metrics
WHERE user_id = 1 AND training_readiness_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY metric_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', metric_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, training_readiness_score FROM daily_health_metrics WHERE user_id = 1 AND training_readiness_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY metric_date

panels.title: Training readiness

panels.description: Daily training load from activities (sum per day).

targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', activity_date) AS INTEGER) AS time,
       SUM(training_load) AS daily_load
FROM activities
WHERE user_id = 1 AND training_load IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY activity_date
ORDER BY activity_date ASC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', activity_date) AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(training_load) AS daily_load FROM activities WHERE user_id = 1 AND training_load IS NOT NULL GROUP BY activity_date ORDER BY activity_date

panels.title: Daily training load

panels.description: Avg HR during activity vs ambient temperature. Populated once analytics/weather_enrich.py has been run.

targets.queryText:
SELECT w.temperature_c AS temperature_c,
       a.avg_heart_rate AS avg_hr
FROM activity_weather w
JOIN activities a
  ON a.user_id = w.user_id AND a.activity_id = w.activity_id
WHERE w.user_id = 1
  AND w.temperature_c IS NOT NULL
  AND a.avg_heart_rate IS NOT NULL
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT w.temperature_c, a.avg_heart_rate FROM activity_weather w JOIN activities a ON a.activity_id = w.activity_id WHERE a.avg_heart_rate IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Avg HR vs temperature (activities)

title: Garmin — Health overview
